conclusion: Use vol_*/pdf/motte_1729_vol*.pdf as the canonical scan source for page mapping, OCR alignment, quotation verification, and English node extraction. Treat vol_*/raw_pdf/ as supplementary modern reprint references only.
manual_visual_review: The user-provided Vol.1 cover identifies a Higher Education Press 2016 edition.
The cover states that the translations were revised and supplied with a historical and explanatory appendix by Florian Cajori.
The user-provided PDFs are re-typeset editions, not page-for-page scans of the Internet Archive 1729 source.

volumes.user_provided_pdf: vol_1/raw_pdf/mathematical principles of natural philosophy 英 第一卷扫描.pdf
